problem id: e4525488
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01011110 -> 00100101
  01011100 -> 01000101
  10111001 -> 10011011
  01110011 -> 00010111
  01110010 -> 00100111
  01001000 -> 10000100
  11010000 -> 00001101
  00110010 -> 00100011
  10101111 -> 00011010

query: 10110011
predicted answer: 00011011
